# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt

The session is still live, nothing has been reviewed yet, and the team mainly wants to capture the chat, export a transcript, and make it searchable before deciding what any of it means.

## Expected selection

do_not_use

## Why

The source is still an active session, and the requested work is capture, transcript export, and indexing rather than post-session donor harvest from a reviewed artifact.

## Expected object

A deflection toward reviewed-session prerequisites or history techniques instead of donor harvest.

## Boundary notes

Do not use this skill for live sessions or for raw session capture, transcript export, or local indexing. Those are history-adjacent prerequisites, not donor harvest.

## Verification hooks

The response should say that review is missing, should not pretend the session already contains settled reusable units, and should redirect toward the correct prerequisite work.
